description: Use this API to add a load component model of a designated type to a specified load or subsystem. If a component model of the designated type already exists at the load or subsystem, it is replaced. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.5. ierr = add_loadc_model(ibus, ltypname, id, name, mcomp, nicn, idata, chdata, ncon, rdata)
python_syntax: ierr = add_loadc_model(ibus, ltypname, id, name, mcomp, nicn, idata, chdata, ncon, rdata)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: Bus, owner, zone or area number. ignored when an all type load model is specified (unless an all type load model is specified). (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: ltypname
parameters.description: Load type, or “ “ if the model is not applied to applied to “load type”subsystem. (input; blank by default).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Load identifier, or “*” if the model is applied to all loads in the subsystem. (input; blank by default).

parameters.name: mcomp
parameters.description: Model component number. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: nicn
parameters.description: Number of icons required by the model. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: idata
parameters.description: An array of NICN elements specifying ICON data. (input; 0 by default). When a character value is intended for an ICON value, the corresponding IDATA entry is ignored and the integer ICON is set to 0).

parameters.name: chdata
parameters.description: An array of NICN elements specifying character ICON data (no default allowed for an ICON for which a character value is to be specified). When an integer value is intended for an ICON value, the corresponding CHDATA entry must be either defaulted or specified as either ‘$$’ or ‘ ‘; the character ICON is set to ‘$$’. (input; blank by default).

parameters.name: ncon
parameters.description: Number of cons required by the model. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: rdata
parameters.description: An array of NCON elements specifying CON data. (input; 0.0 by default).

error_codes.description: no error.
load model connection tables full–use pack load model tables function.
model NAME is not a load component model.

model NAME is not a <STYPE> model.
